description_long: This object is a traditional candle set in a dark, octagonal metal holder with a wide base and a raised rim. The candle itself is tall and cylindrical, with a reddish-brown wax body that shows some subtle surface texture and discoloration. The metal holder features a prominent circular handle attached to one side, allowing for easy carrying or hanging. The base of the holder is broad and flat, providing stability and preventing wax from dripping onto surfaces below. The candle is inserted into a central socket, which is slightly elevated above the main plate of the holder. There are no visible flames or wicks, and the candle appears unused, with no melted wax or drips present.
description: A tall reddish-brown candle sits in a wide, dark metal holder with an octagonal base and a circular carrying handle. The candle is unlit and shows no wax drips or visible wick.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle centered in the metal holder, with the handle not visible from this angle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the circular metal handle extending outward from the left side of the holder.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle mostly hidden, focusing on the symmetry of the holder and the candle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the handle on the right, curving upward and away from the base.
